message: fix: Remove || true from Windows build to properly show errors

files.patch:
@@ -192,7 +192,7 @@ jobs:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build -freference-trace=20 2>&1 || true
+        run: zig build -freference-trace=20
 
       - name: Run Windows-specific CPython tests
         id: test-windows
